title: borbonia indica
intro: Borbonia indica, also known as the Indian borbonia, is a plant species belonging to the family Myoporaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Borbonia indica include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Borbonia indica is traditionally prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
